MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, JONATHAN E. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-04-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNCIL PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF WHO WAS REPRESENTED BY HIS ATTORNEY OF RECORD, FARLEY S. TOLPEN, ESQ. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT MARGARET MOORE FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE AT 1785 O'FARRELL STREET APARTMENT 2 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. DEFENDANT TO VACATE BY 4/18/94 AT 5 P.M. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH. STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 5 P.M. ON 4/18/94. PLAINTIFF TO RETAIN FIRST AND LAST MONTHS RENT AND SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES PAST DUE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES. DEFENDANT MOORE TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH A DOCUMENT TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT PROVIDED THAT SHE COMPLIES WITH ALL STIPULATED TERMS HEREIN MENTIONED.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, MARGARET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1785 O'FARRELL STREET APT. #2 S.F. CA. 94115, STAYED UNTIL APR-19-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH. PROVIDED DEFENDANT VACATES BY 4/18/94 AT 5:00 P.M WRIT TO BE CANCELLED BY PLTF. PLTF. TO RETAIN ANY MONIES IN HIS POSSESSION FOR FIRST AND LAST MONTHS RENT AND SECURITY DEPOSIT. PLTF WAIVES OTHER RENT. PLTF TO VACATE JUDGMENT IF DEFT COMPLIES WITH ALL TERMS.
